projectSummary.name: CGPA Calculator
projectSummary.description: CGPA · SGPA · Percentage Calculator — Calculate, track, and achieve your academic goals
projectSummary.author: Varun79-python

typescript.notes: All application logic, components, types, and utility functions are written in TypeScript with strict-ish settings (target es5, module esnext, bundler resolution)

css.notes: Single globals.css file (~2066 lines) containing the entire design system — CSS custom properties, light/dark themes, responsive breakpoints, component styles. Uses Tailwind directives at top.

javascript.notes: postcss.config.js, tailwind.config.js, next.config.js — build/config files only. Also auto-generated public/sw.js and workbox-e1521e97.js (PWA service worker)

json.notes: package.json, tsconfig.json, jsconfig.json, manifest.json, next-env.d.ts (auto-generated declaration), plus lock files

yaml.notes: pnpm-lock.yaml and pnpm-workspace.yaml (controls allowed builds for tesseract.js)

markdown.notes: No README or documentation files found in project root

next.name: Next.js
next.notes: Pages Router (not App Router). Uses _app.tsx, _document.tsx, and page-based routing. PWA support via next-pwa plugin.

react.name: React
react.notes: Standard React with useState/useEffect hooks. No server components used.

tailwindcss.name: Tailwind CSS
tailwindcss.notes: Used via PostCSS plugin. Custom design system built on top with CSS custom properties. Tailwind directives in globals.css but most styling uses vanilla CSS classes.

zustand.name: Zustand
zustand.notes: Lightweight state management. Stores: useThemeStore, useHistoryStore, useUIStore, useCalculationStore, useDegreeStore — all in store/useStore.ts

features: SGPA Calculator — manual entry with subject-wise grades and credits
OCR Marksheets — Tesseract.js based image-to-text for auto-filling subjects
CGPA Calculator — weighted by credits across semesters
CGPA-to-Percentage Converter — university-specific formulas (UGC, JNTU, Anna, VTU, Mumbai, Custom)
CGPA Goal Predictor — calculate required SGPA to reach target CGPA
Calculation History — localStorage persistence, up to 50 entries
PDF Export — professional academic reports via jsPDF
4 Degree Types — Diploma (6 sem), Degree (6 sem), B.Tech (8 sem), M.Tech (4 sem)
11 Grading Schemas — UGC CBCS, JNTU, Anna University, VTU, Mumbai, KTU, GTU, MAKAUT, IIT/NIT, Mumbai Legacy, Custom
3 Themes — light, dark, system (with FOUC prevention in _document.tsx)
PWA — Service Worker via next-pwa, offline support with cache strategies
Dark Mode Flash Prevention — inline script in _document.tsx reads localStorage before paint
Security Headers — HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, XSS-Protection, CSP-adjacent
SEO — Structured Data (Schema.org), Open Graph, Twitter Cards, sitemap.xml, robots.txt

pages/._app.tsx: App wrapper — theme init, route transitions, toast/command palette/network status/ErrorBoundary
pages/._document.tsx: Custom document — dark mode script, font loading, SEO meta, structured data
pages/.index.tsx: Dashboard — hero, features grid, university support badges, banner carousel

components/.Shared/Header.tsx: App header with brand, theme toggle, degree switcher
components/.Shared/Tabs.tsx: Navigation tabs with marquee animation on mobile
components/.Shared/BannerCarousel.tsx: Auto-rotating banner carousel with dots and arrows
components/.Calculator/SGPAForm.tsx: SGPA calculator form with subject rows
components/.Calculator/CGPAForm.tsx: CGPA calculator form with semester grid
components/.Calculator/Converter.tsx: CGPA↔Percentage converter with university formula selection
components/.History/HistorySidebar.tsx: History sidebar panel with CRUD operations

config/.constants.ts: Degree configs, grading schemas (11 universities), validation rules, storage keys, app info

store/.useStore.ts: Zustand stores — theme, history, UI, calculation, degree state

types/.index.ts: TypeScript interfaces — Subject, Semester, CalculationResult, HistoryEntry, DegreeType, GradeMapping, UniversityFormula

styles/.globals.css: Complete design system — CSS custom properties, light/dark themes, all component styles, responsive breakpoints

public/.manifest.json: PWA manifest — app name, icons, display standalone

tsconfig.json.purpose: TypeScript configuration — target es5, bundler module resolution, path alias @/*

tailwind.config.js.purpose: Tailwind CSS configuration — custom fonts (Inter, Outfit, JetBrains Mono), custom colors (ink scale), animations, shadows

next.config.js.purpose: Next.js configuration — PWA setup (next-pwa), security headers, SWC minify, console removal in production

pnpm-workspace.yaml.purpose: pnpm workspace config — blocks builds for core-js and tesseract.js

.gitignore.purpose: Git ignore rules — node_modules, .next, build, env files, TypeScript build info

architecture.routing: Next.js Pages Router — file-based routing under pages/
architecture.stateManagement: Zustand with 5 stores — theme, history, UI, calculation, degree. All persisted to localStorage.
architecture.styling: Hybrid — CSS custom properties design system (globals.css) + Tailwind utilities. Mobile-first responsive with 3 breakpoints (mobile default, 768px tablet, 1024px desktop).
architecture.dataPersistence: localStorage only — no backend, no database. History capped at 50 entries.
architecture.buildTooling: Next.js built-in (SWC), pnpm package manager, TypeScript 5.9
architecture.deployment: Vercel (inferred from sitemap URLs and .vercel in .gitignore)
architecture.pwa: Service Worker via next-pwa with NetworkFirst/StaleWhileRevalidate/CacheFirst strategies
